TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Niw-yiÁīźÁīĄ nilaculan niw-yi-si pulung nu ngangan u niw-yi , tini i amilika niw-yi nu timulan "cay kaw nu niw-yi a kitidaan", u katuuday nu Amilika ku tademaw nu tukay , niw-yi a tukay u tatelungan , atu nu kitakit satabakiay a malacacay nu tukay , u sapakaynu tu cikiw sapilacul , papaliwalan , kalisiw pahusuay , mikuwanay , sapalangaw , atu sasalamaan odaw naming ku ni kacalilawan nu kitakit a tabakiay a tukay . Niw-yiu pulung nu kitakid kitidaan nu tungus i tini , kyu patucek han tu kitakit nu sapapaliw a kitidaan . Niw-yi panganganan tu kitakit u tatelungan nu tukay atu " kitidaan nu kitakit" . Niw-yi i tini Amilika nu walian , mitepal tu ta-si-yung a dadipasan , u satabakiay nu pahelak a minatu u Niw-yi atu niw-ce-si a minatu. . u Niw-yi pulung idaw ku man-ha-tun kitidaan , huwang-hu-kitidaan , pu-lu-ke-li-kitidaan, pu-lang-ke-se , se-tay-ten a subal kitidaan lima a kakuwanan , u tungusay idaw naming ku sausi nu Niw-yi-cu nu kitidaan . . 1898 a mihcaan, limaay a kakuwanan palaapien naming mu pulung mala aydaay nu niw-yi-se . 1898ŚĻī, . Niw-yi u maminay nu Amilika sayadahay ku tademaw macacelcel ku tukat , 2012 a mihcaan sa u tademaw nu heni 8,336,697 ku muenegay itini nu pala asausi sa 302.64 acubu nu ing-li "783.8 acubu nu kuli" nu lala' . Niw-yi a tukay nu kitidaan maminay nu Amilika nu tukay a kitidaan u tademaw sa u saydahay , u tademaw makaala tu 1980 a emang , nika nu maminay nu pulung a musausi kuy nidada , I tabakiay a kitidaan nu tademaw sa makaala tu 2340 a eemang . Niw-yi nu Amilika a kamu atu tademaw nu heni a binacadan u yadahay ku cancanan a tukuy kuy tiniay , nuy tiniay akamu makaala tu 800 a sasamamuen , ni ka tu mihmihca tayniau a labang i Niw-yi makaalatu 5500 a emang , katuuday a kitidaan atu nipacizu tu kakatinengan tu. u cayay kalecad nu Niw-yi maala nu kitakit masasingay u yadahay a tukay . u pasinbunnay nu putah tini i pay-law-huy a kakacuduan nu Niw-yi idaw ku " amilika nu ziwzika a dadan" asingangan , nu kitakit katuuday a muculilay atademaw macacelcel tini muculil atu kitakit nu sasalamaan nu sapilacul nu kitidaan . tukay yadah ku sangaw, kaytati aluma' atu aaidangan u singanganay I kitakit . Niw-yi nu pakalisiway a kitidaan man-ha-tun a tukay nu huwal-ciy u tatangahan kuyni , singangan tu kitakid kitidaan nu pakalisiway , kitakit satabakiay a papaliyunan nu cen-cin tini masasupaliyun " hida u sunganganay ku sausi nu ku-si" Niw-yi papaliyunan tu cen-ciyn itini tu . man-ha-tu nu pacakayay tu luma' sa nu kitakit u satekesay tini , nu cung-ku akitidaan nu pangkiw nu tipan u macacelcelay ku muenegay nu tademaw itini Niw-yi nu sasaay a silamalay nu kitakit u sakapahay masabaluhayay a tukay u kakacawan masinanut, sademiad sa muculil 24 a tatukian cayay pahanhan miedap . . Niw-yi u yadaha nu talakaway a cacudadan itini , pasu cang-cun-ten pulung a cacudadan nu ke-lun-pi-ya- nu tabakiay a cacudadan atu Niw-yi a tabakiay a cacudadan ina tu say a cacudadan u nu kitakit nipasilsil malu nu ayawan nu tulu bataan a cacudadan . yu 2005 a mihcaan maminay nu Niw-yi 36% a tademaw u cayay kaw amilika naming caykaytiniay a ni lecuhan Śú®2005ŚĻī,ŚÖ®ŚłāśúČ36% . Niw-yi tini i Niw-yi nu timulan atuwqalian , tini naming ku kitidaan i huwa-sen tun micidekay a kitidaan atu pu-se-tun nu laad , tukay nu Niw-yi micapi tu ha-te-sin a banaw , nu bayi aniculil tu balunga u tada madayum , kyu tiniay kalamkam macakat ku tukay mala cacubelisan tu papacakayay a kitidaan . . Niw-yi maminay nu kitidaan tadaadidi' ku man-ha-tun , se-tay-ten a subal, atu cang-taw , kyu katuud ku tademaw macacelcel . ha-te-sun abanaw micaliway i ha-te-sun nu kalikidan a sauwac micumud i Niw-yi atu niw-ce-si-cu ku laad . malecad tu i Niw-yi nu walian a banaw macaliway i cang-taw- a bayu' u pu-lang-ke-se atu cang-taw malaloyas . Halay-mu a banaw tini I walian atu ha-te-sun a banaw nu laad , malaliyas tu man-ha-tun atu pu-lang-ke-se a kitidaan nu mikuwanay . pu-lang-ke-se micaliway tu pu-lang-ke-se atu wiy-se-te-ce-se -te a kitidaan , nu Niw-yi-se masacayay u nanum nu balad . Niw-yi-se u maminay a kitidaan ni sangaan tu naming , namakay ni nu he-lan mikuwanay malingatu misa tabaki tu micunutu bayu miselen tini i man-ha-tun nu sasaan a tukay , nayi 1970 amihcaan katukuh 1980 a mihcaan pasu paw-tay aaidangan mikiyaku tu . Niw-yi-se pulung nu pala' sa 468.9 acubu nu ing-li "1,214 cubu nu kung-li" duma sa 164.1 a cubu nu ing-li "425 a cubu nu kung-li" sa u nanum , 304.8 a cubu nu ing-li "789 a cubu nu kung-li" malaenal . )ÁāļťôłŚúį. labu nu tukay a talakaw sa tini i se-tay-ten a subal nu tu-te-a buyu', makaala tu 409.8 a depah "124.9 a depah , nu mayn-in-cu nu timulan nu walian mududuc tu satalakaway . .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == niw-ji** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan niw-ji-si pur~…ĺuŇč nu ŇčaŇčan u niw-ji , tini i amir~…ĺika niw-ji nu timur~…ĺan " ¶aj kaw nu niw-ji a kitidaan", u katuudaj nu amir~…ĺika ku tad…ômaw nu tukaj , niw-ji a tukaj u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan , atu nu kitakit satabakiaj a mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj nu tukaj , u sapakajnu tu ¶ikiw sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ , papar~…ĺiwar~…ĺan , kar~…ĺisiw pańßusuaj , mikuwanaj , sapar~…ĺaŇčaw , atu sasar~…ĺamaan odaw namiŇč ku ni ka ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawan nu kitakit a tabakiaj a tukaj . niw-jiu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakid kitidaan nu tuŇčus i tini , kju patu ¶…ôk ńßan tu kitakit nu sapapar~…ĺiw a kitidaan . niw-ji paŇčaŇčanan tu kitakit u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu tukaj atu " kitidaan nu kitakit" . niw-ji i tini amir~…ĺika nu war~…ĺian , mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ta-si-juŇč a dadipasan , u satabakiaj nu pańß…ôr~…ĺak a minatu u niw-ji atu niw- ¶…ô-si a minatu. . u niw-ji pur~…ĺuŇč idaw ku man-ńßa-tun kitidaan , ńßuwaŇč-ńßu-kitidaan , pu-r~…ĺu-k…ô-r~…ĺi-kitidaan, pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô , s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ kitidaan r~…ĺima a kakuwanan , u tuŇčusaj idaw namiŇč ku sausi nu niw-ji- ¶u nu kitidaan . . **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺimaaj a kakuwanan par~…ĺaapi…ôn namiŇč mu pur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu niw-ji-s…ô . *****, . niw-ji u maminaj nu amir~…ĺika sajadańßaj ku tad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku tukat , **** a mińß ¶aan sa u tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni *,***,*** ku mu…ôn…ôgaj itini nu par~…ĺa asausi sa ***.** a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "***.* a ¶ubu nu kur~…ĺi" nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° . niw-ji a tukaj nu kitidaan maminaj nu amir~…ĺika nu tukaj a kitidaan u tad…ômaw sa u sajdańßaj , u tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ômaŇč , nika nu maminaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč a musausi kuj nidada , i tabakiaj a kitidaan nu tad…ômaw sa makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ô…ômaŇč . niw-ji nu amir~…ĺika a kamu atu tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni a bina ¶adan u jadańßaj ku ¶an ¶anan a tukuj kuj tiniaj , nuj tiniaj akamu makaar~…ĺa tu *** a sasamamu…ôn , ni ka tu mińßmińß ¶a tajniau a r~…ĺabaŇč i niw-ji makaar~…ĺatu **** a …ômaŇč , katuudaj a kitidaan atu nipa ¶izu tu kakatin…ôŇčan tu. u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu niw-ji maar~…ĺa nu kitakit masasiŇčaj u jadańßaj a tukaj . u pasinbunnaj nu putańß tini i paj-r~…ĺaw-ńßuj a kaka ¶uduan nu niw-ji idaw ku " amir~…ĺika nu ziwzika a dadan" asiŇčaŇčan , nu kitakit katuudaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj atad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ tini mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu kitakit nu sasar~…ĺamaan nu sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu kitidaan . tukaj jadańß ku saŇčaw, kajtati ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu aaidaŇčan u siŇčaŇčanaj i kitakit . niw-ji nu pakar~…ĺisiwaj a kitidaan man-ńßa-tun a tukaj nu ńßuwar~…ĺ- ¶ij u tataŇčańßan kujni , siŇčaŇčan tu kitakid kitidaan nu pakar~…ĺisiwaj , kitakit satabakiaj a papar~…ĺijunan nu ¶…ôn- ¶in tini masasupar~…ĺijun " ńßida u suŇčaŇčanaj ku sausi nu ku-si" niw-ji papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶ijn itini tu . man-ńßa-tu nu pa ¶akajaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa nu kitakit u sat…ôk…ôsaj tini , nu ¶uŇč-ku akitidaan nu paŇčkiw nu tipan u ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj ku mu…ôn…ôgaj nu tad…ômaw itini niw-ji nu sasaaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu kitakit u sakapańßaj masabar~…ĺuńßajaj a tukaj u kaka ¶awan masinanut, sad…ômiad sa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** a tatukian ¶ajaj pańßanńßan mi…ôdap . . niw-ji u jadańßa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan itini , pasu ¶aŇč- ¶un-t…ôn pur~…ĺuŇč a ¶a ¶udadan nu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja- nu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan atu niw-ji a tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan ina tu saj a ¶a ¶udadan u nu kitakit nipasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ mar~…ĺu nu ajawan nu tur~…ĺu bataan a ¶a ¶udadan . ju **** a mińß ¶aan maminaj nu niw-ji **% a tad…ômaw u ¶ajaj kaw amir~…ĺika namiŇč ¶ajkajtiniaj a ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ******,*****% . niw-ji tini i niw-ji nu timur~…ĺan atuw*ar~…ĺian , tini namiŇč ku kitidaan i ńßuwa-s…ôn tun mi ¶id…ôkaj a kitidaan atu pu-s…ô-tun nu r~…ĺaad , tukaj nu niw-ji mi ¶api tu ńßa-t…ô-sin a banaw , nu baji ani ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuŇča u tada madajum , kju tiniaj kar~…ĺamkam ma ¶akat ku tukaj mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan tu papa ¶akajaj a kitidaan . . niw-ji maminaj nu kitidaan tadaadidi Ē~ ° ku man-ńßa-tun , s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ, atu ¶aŇč-taw , kju katuud ku tad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ . ńßa-t…ô-sun abanaw mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj i ńßa-t…ô-sun nu kar~…ĺikidan a sauwa ¶ mi ¶umud i niw-ji atu niw- ¶…ô-si- ¶u ku r~…ĺaad . mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu i niw-ji nu war~…ĺian a banaw ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj i ¶aŇč-taw- a baju Ē~ ° u pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô atu ¶aŇč-taw mar~…ĺar~…ĺojas . ńßar~…ĺaj-mu a banaw tini i war~…ĺian atu ńßa-t…ô-sun a banaw nu r~…ĺaad , mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu man-ńßa-tun atu pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô a kitidaan nu mikuwanaj . pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô atu wij-s…ô-t…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô -t…ô a kitidaan , nu niw-ji-s…ô masa ¶ajaj u nanum nu bar~…ĺad . niw-ji-s…ô u maminaj a kitidaan ni saŇčaan tu namiŇč , namakaj ni nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan mikuwanaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misa tabaki tu mi ¶unutu baju mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tini i man-ńßa-tun nu sasaan a tukaj , naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan pasu paw-taj aaidaŇčan mikijaku tu . niw-ji-s…ô pur~…ĺuŇč nu par~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*,*** ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" duma sa ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*** a ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" sa u nanum , ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*** a ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" mar~…ĺa…ônar~…ĺ . )***. r~…ĺabu nu tukaj a tar~…ĺakaw sa tini i s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ nu tu-t…ô-a buju Ē~ °, makaar~…ĺa tu ***.* a d…ôpańß "***.* a d…ôpańß , nu majn-in- ¶u nu timur~…ĺan nu war~…ĺian mududu ¶ tu satar~…ĺakawaj . .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Niw-yiÁīźÁīĄ nilaculan niw-yi-si pulung nu ngangan u niw-yi , tini i amilika niw-yi nu timulan "cay kaw nu niw-yi a kitidaan", u katuuday nu Amilika ku tademaw nu tukay , niw-yi a tukay u tatelungan , atu nu kitakit satabakiay a malacacay nu tukay , u sapakaynu tu cikiw sapilacul , papaliwalan , kalisiw pahusuay , mikuwanay , sapalangaw , atu sasalamaan odaw naming ku ni kacalilawan nu kitakit a tabakiay a tukay . Niw-yiu pulung nu kitakid kitidaan nu tungus i tini , kyu patucek han tu kitakit nu sapapaliw a kitidaan . Niw-yi panganganan tu kitakit u tatelungan nu tukay atu " kitidaan nu kitakit" . Niw-yi i tini Amilika nu walian , mitepal tu ta-si-yung a dadipasan , u satabakiay nu pahelak a minatu u Niw-yi atu niw-ce-si a minatu. . u Niw-yi pulung idaw ku man-ha-tun kitidaan , huwang-hu-kitidaan , pu-lu-ke-li-kitidaan, pu-lang-ke-se , se-tay-ten a subal kitidaan lima a kakuwanan , u tungusay idaw naming ku sausi nu Niw-yi-cu nu kitidaan . . 1898 a mihcaan, limaay a kakuwanan palaapien naming mu pulung mala aydaay nu niw-yi-se . 1898ŚĻī, . Niw-yi u maminay nu Amilika sayadahay ku tademaw macacelcel ku tukat , 2012 a mihcaan sa u tademaw nu heni 8,336,697 ku muenegay itini nu pala asausi sa 302.64 acubu nu ing-li "783.8 acubu nu kuli" nu lala' . Niw-yi a tukay nu kitidaan maminay nu Amilika nu tukay a kitidaan u tademaw sa u saydahay , u tademaw makaala tu 1980 a emang , nika nu maminay nu pulung a musausi kuy nidada , I tabakiay a kitidaan nu tademaw sa makaala tu 2340 a eemang . Niw-yi nu Amilika a kamu atu tademaw nu heni a binacadan u yadahay ku cancanan a tukuy kuy tiniay , nuy tiniay akamu makaala tu 800 a sasamamuen , ni ka tu mihmihca tayniau a labang i Niw-yi makaalatu 5500 a emang , katuuday a kitidaan atu nipacizu tu kakatinengan tu. u cayay kalecad nu Niw-yi maala nu kitakit masasingay u yadahay a tukay . u pasinbunnay nu putah tini i pay-law-huy a kakacuduan nu Niw-yi idaw ku " amilika nu ziwzika a dadan" asingangan , nu kitakit katuuday a muculilay atademaw macacelcel tini muculil atu kitakit nu sasalamaan nu sapilacul nu kitidaan . tukay yadah ku sangaw, kaytati aluma' atu aaidangan u singanganay I kitakit . Niw-yi nu pakalisiway a kitidaan man-ha-tun a tukay nu huwal-ciy u tatangahan kuyni , singangan tu kitakid kitidaan nu pakalisiway , kitakit satabakiay a papaliyunan nu cen-cin tini masasupaliyun " hida u sunganganay ku sausi nu ku-si" Niw-yi papaliyunan tu cen-ciyn itini tu . man-ha-tu nu pacakayay tu luma' sa nu kitakit u satekesay tini , nu cung-ku akitidaan nu pangkiw nu tipan u macacelcelay ku muenegay nu tademaw itini Niw-yi nu sasaay a silamalay nu kitakit u sakapahay masabaluhayay a tukay u kakacawan masinanut, sademiad sa muculil 24 a tatukian cayay pahanhan miedap . . Niw-yi u yadaha nu talakaway a cacudadan itini , pasu cang-cun-ten pulung a cacudadan nu ke-lun-pi-ya- nu tabakiay a cacudadan atu Niw-yi a tabakiay a cacudadan ina tu say a cacudadan u nu kitakit nipasilsil malu nu ayawan nu tulu bataan a cacudadan . yu 2005 a mihcaan maminay nu Niw-yi 36% a tademaw u cayay kaw amilika naming caykaytiniay a ni lecuhan Śú®2005ŚĻī,ŚÖ®ŚłāśúČ36% . Niw-yi tini i Niw-yi nu timulan atuwqalian , tini naming ku kitidaan i huwa-sen tun micidekay a kitidaan atu pu-se-tun nu laad , tukay nu Niw-yi micapi tu ha-te-sin a banaw , nu bayi aniculil tu balunga u tada madayum , kyu tiniay kalamkam macakat ku tukay mala cacubelisan tu papacakayay a kitidaan . . Niw-yi maminay nu kitidaan tadaadidi' ku man-ha-tun , se-tay-ten a subal, atu cang-taw , kyu katuud ku tademaw macacelcel . ha-te-sun abanaw micaliway i ha-te-sun nu kalikidan a sauwac micumud i Niw-yi atu niw-ce-si-cu ku laad . malecad tu i Niw-yi nu walian a banaw macaliway i cang-taw- a bayu' u pu-lang-ke-se atu cang-taw malaloyas . Halay-mu a banaw tini I walian atu ha-te-sun a banaw nu laad , malaliyas tu man-ha-tun atu pu-lang-ke-se a kitidaan nu mikuwanay . pu-lang-ke-se micaliway tu pu-lang-ke-se atu wiy-se-te-ce-se -te a kitidaan , nu Niw-yi-se masacayay u nanum nu balad . Niw-yi-se u maminay a kitidaan ni sangaan tu naming , namakay ni nu he-lan mikuwanay malingatu misa tabaki tu micunutu bayu miselen tini i man-ha-tun nu sasaan a tukay , nayi 1970 amihcaan katukuh 1980 a mihcaan pasu paw-tay aaidangan mikiyaku tu . Niw-yi-se pulung nu pala' sa 468.9 acubu nu ing-li "1,214 cubu nu kung-li" duma sa 164.1 a cubu nu ing-li "425 a cubu nu kung-li" sa u nanum , 304.8 a cubu nu ing-li "789 a cubu nu kung-li" malaenal . )ÁāļťôłŚúį. labu nu tukay a talakaw sa tini i se-tay-ten a subal nu tu-te-a buyu', makaala tu 409.8 a depah "124.9 a depah , nu mayn-in-cu nu timulan nu walian mududuc tu satalakaway . .

tad…ômaw nu tukaj , niw-ji a tukaj u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan , atu nu kitakit satabakiaj a mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj nu tukaj , u sapakajnu tu ¶ikiw sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ , papar~…ĺiwar~…ĺan , kar~…ĺisiw pańßusuaj , mikuwanaj , sapar~…ĺaŇčaw , atu sasar~…ĺamaan odaw namiŇč ku ni ka ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawan nu kitakit a tabakiaj a tukaj . niw-jiu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kitakid kitidaan nu tuŇčus i tini , kju patu ¶…ôk ńßan tu kitakit nu sapapar~…ĺiw a kitidaan . niw-ji paŇčaŇčanan tu kitakit u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu tukaj atu " kitidaan nu kitakit" . niw-ji i tini amir~…ĺika nu war~…ĺian , mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ta-si-juŇč a dadipasan , u satabakiaj nu pańß…ôr~…ĺak a minatu u niw-ji atu niw- ¶…ô-si a minatu. . u niw-ji pur~…ĺuŇč idaw ku man-ńßa-tun kitidaan , ńßuwaŇč-ńßu-kitidaan , pu-r~…ĺu-k…ô-r~…ĺi-kitidaan, pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô , s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ kitidaan r~…ĺima a kakuwanan , u tuŇčusaj idaw namiŇč ku sausi nu niw-ji- ¶u nu kitidaan . . **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺimaaj a kakuwanan par~…ĺaapi…ôn namiŇč mu pur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺa ajdaaj nu niw-ji-s…ô . *****, . niw-ji u maminaj nu amir~…ĺika sajadańßaj ku tad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku tukat , **** a mińß ¶aan sa u tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni *,***,*** ku mu…ôn…ôgaj itini nu par~…ĺa asausi sa ***.** a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "***.* a ¶ubu nu kur~…ĺi" nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° . niw-ji a tukaj nu kitidaan maminaj nu amir~…ĺika nu tukaj a kitidaan u tad…ômaw sa u sajdańßaj , u tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ômaŇč , nika nu maminaj nu pur~…ĺuŇč a musausi kuj nidada , i tabakiaj a kitidaan nu tad…ômaw sa makaar~…ĺa tu **** a …ô…ômaŇč . niw-ji nu amir~…ĺika a kamu atu tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni a bina ¶adan u jadańßaj ku ¶an ¶anan a tukuj kuj tiniaj , nuj tiniaj akamu makaar~…ĺa tu *** a sasamamu…ôn , ni ka tu mińßmińß ¶a tajniau a r~…ĺabaŇč i niw-ji makaar~…ĺatu **** a …ômaŇč , katuudaj a kitidaan atu nipa ¶izu tu kakatin…ôŇčan tu. u ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu niw-ji maar~…ĺa nu kitakit masasiŇčaj u jadańßaj a tukaj . u pasinbunnaj nu putańß tini i paj-r~…ĺaw-ńßuj a kaka ¶uduan nu niw-ji idaw ku " amir~…ĺika nu ziwzika a dadan" asiŇčaŇčan , nu kitakit katuudaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj atad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ tini mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu kitakit nu sasar~…ĺamaan nu sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu kitidaan . tukaj jadańß ku saŇčaw, kajtati ar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu aaidaŇčan u siŇčaŇčanaj i kitakit . niw-ji nu pakar~…ĺisiwaj a kitidaan man-ńßa-tun a tukaj nu ńßuwar~…ĺ- ¶ij u tataŇčańßan kujni , siŇčaŇčan tu kitakid kitidaan nu pakar~…ĺisiwaj , kitakit satabakiaj a papar~…ĺijunan nu ¶…ôn- ¶in tini masasupar~…ĺijun " ńßida u suŇčaŇčanaj ku sausi nu ku-si" niw-ji papar~…ĺijunan tu ¶…ôn- ¶ijn itini tu . man-ńßa-tu nu pa ¶akajaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa nu kitakit u sat…ôk…ôsaj tini , nu ¶uŇč-ku akitidaan nu paŇčkiw nu tipan u ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj ku mu…ôn…ôgaj nu tad…ômaw itini niw-ji nu sasaaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu kitakit u sakapańßaj masabar~…ĺuńßajaj a tukaj u kaka ¶awan masinanut, sad…ômiad sa mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ** a tatukian ¶ajaj pańßanńßan mi…ôdap . . niw-ji u jadańßa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan itini , pasu ¶aŇč- ¶un-t…ôn pur~…ĺuŇč a ¶a ¶udadan nu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja- nu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan atu niw-ji a tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan ina tu saj a ¶a ¶udadan u nu kitakit nipasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ mar~…ĺu nu ajawan nu tur~…ĺu bataan a ¶a ¶udadan . ju **** a mińß ¶aan maminaj nu niw-ji **% a tad…ômaw u ¶ajaj kaw amir~…ĺika namiŇč ¶ajkajtiniaj a ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ******,*****% . niw-ji tini i niw-ji nu timur~…ĺan atuw*ar~…ĺian , tini namiŇč ku kitidaan i ńßuwa-s…ôn tun mi ¶id…ôkaj a kitidaan atu pu-s…ô-tun nu r~…ĺaad , tukaj nu niw-ji mi ¶api tu ńßa-t…ô-sin a banaw , nu baji ani ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺuŇča u tada madajum , kju tiniaj kar~…ĺamkam ma ¶akat ku tukaj mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶ub…ôr~…ĺisan tu papa ¶akajaj a kitidaan . . niw-ji maminaj nu kitidaan tadaadidi Ē~ ° ku man-ńßa-tun , s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ, atu ¶aŇč-taw , kju katuud ku tad…ômaw ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ . ńßa-t…ô-sun abanaw mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj i ńßa-t…ô-sun nu kar~…ĺikidan a sauwa ¶ mi ¶umud i niw-ji atu niw- ¶…ô-si- ¶u ku r~…ĺaad . mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu i niw-ji nu war~…ĺian a banaw ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj i ¶aŇč-taw- a baju Ē~ ° u pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô atu ¶aŇč-taw mar~…ĺar~…ĺojas . ńßar~…ĺaj-mu a banaw tini i war~…ĺian atu ńßa-t…ô-sun a banaw nu r~…ĺaad , mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu man-ńßa-tun atu pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô a kitidaan nu mikuwanaj . pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu pu-r~…ĺaŇč-k…ô-s…ô atu wij-s…ô-t…ô- ¶…ô-s…ô -t…ô a kitidaan , nu niw-ji-s…ô masa ¶ajaj u nanum nu bar~…ĺad . niw-ji-s…ô u maminaj a kitidaan ni saŇčaan tu namiŇč , namakaj ni nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan mikuwanaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu misa tabaki tu mi ¶unutu baju mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôn tini i man-ńßa-tun nu sasaan a tukaj , naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan pasu paw-taj aaidaŇčan mikijaku tu . niw-ji-s…ô pur~…ĺuŇč nu par~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*,*** ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" duma sa ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*** a ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" sa u nanum , ***.* a ¶ubu nu iŇč-r~…ĺi "*** a ¶ubu nu kuŇč-r~…ĺi" mar~…ĺa…ônar~…ĺ . )***. r~…ĺabu nu tukaj a tar~…ĺakaw sa tini i s…ô-taj-t…ôn a subar~…ĺ nu tu-t…ô-a buju Ē~ °, makaar~…ĺa tu ***.* a d…ôpańß "***.* a d…ôpańß , nu majn-in- ¶u nu timur~…ĺan nu war~…ĺian mududu ¶ tu satar~…ĺakawaj . .
